smoke.detail: Mocked unit test (tests/test_model_ochem_ppb.py) passes 12/12 in the core env: drives submit->pending->pending->ready poll loop, LogIt->%->fraction transform (logit 0->50%, ln9->90%), retry/backoff recovery, $$$$ batch positional alignment, raw-response cache hit skips network, output validates against core.schemas.OutputRecord. Full fast tier green (301 passed). No LIVE OCHEM call: ochem.eu:443 failed TLS cert verification and rest.ochem.eu:443 refused connection from the build environment, so a real % bound + the exact response field names could not be verified.

note: OCHEM PPB api-model built: modelId=1121 wired, LogIt->%->fraction transform, async submit+poll, retry/backoff, raw-response cache, native ASNN DM/accuracy -> uncertainty.extra, F-16 desalted-neutral divergence flagged. needs_aaran residue: live response field names + a real fixture prediction (OCHEM unreachable from build env; placeholder response keys documented, no fabrication).
